name: Litterbox Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup (1 and 1/3 sticks) butter or margarine
2/3 cup (1 and 1/3 sticks) butter or margarine
Spices: ginger, cinnamon, cloves to taste (maybe 1/2 tsp each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave the honey until it bubbles (about 1 minute).
2. Add the butter and molasses (if using) to the honey.
3. Add the egg, mix well.
4. Mix in all other ingredients: whole wheat flour, cocoa powder, Grape-nuts cereal, and spices.
5. Add any desired mix-ins.
6. Chill the dough for 1 hour in the freezer or several hours in the fridge.
7. Roll the dough into logs of random length and the diameter of cat poop.
8. Roll the logs in Grape-nuts cereal.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until done (10 to 15 minutes).
10. Serve on a bed of Grape-nuts with a cat litter scoop. Optional: decorate the box and scoop with melted chocolate or pudding for extra effect.
